sources.excerpt: Rendered page independently exposes Lunch, Dinner, and Brunch tabs. Lunch/Dinner include prix fixe plus Raw Bar, Salads, Handhelds, Soups, Starters, Flatbread, Tacos, Quesadillas, Entrees, Steak Frites, Pasta, Sides, and Daily Specials; Brunch includes prix fixe plus Brunch Plates and Benedicts. Peroni N/A and Mocktails No-Jito/Raspberry Kiss are the included nonalcoholic products. Item descriptions support only explicit direct positives.
Official site schema and header identify Bar Angie at 2300 N Street Northwest, Washington, DC 20037; the site links the Bar Angie menu/location page.
